model_comparison: Model 1 followed the instructions perfectly, delivering the line with a very low, deep pitch that suited the atmospheric text. Model 2 completely ignored the pitch constraint, delivering the line in a high-pitched, cheerful voice. Therefore, Model 1 is the clear winner.
